header.slogan: BINOVET - Partnering with the Global Livestock Industry

about.paragraph: Binovet Pharmaceuticals is proud to be a leader in applying American biotechnology to veterinary pharmaceutical production in Vietnam. We are committed to delivering optimal healthcare solutions that boost sustainable livestock productivity.
about.feature1Desc: A modern production line with rigorous control processes meeting international standards.
about.feature2Desc: A team of experienced experts always ready to accompany farm owners.

featured.sub: Our best-selling veterinary pharmaceutical lines, widely trusted across the market

why.sub: Our mission is to deliver optimal medical solutions that protect and improve the productivity of livestock herds in Vietnam.

features.title: USA Technology
features.desc: Advanced American technology applied to veterinary pharmaceutical production

features.title: GMP Certified
features.desc: Factory meeting GMP-WHO quality standards for pharmaceutical manufacturing

features.title: 200+ Products
features.desc: Quality solutions for animal husbandry. BTV has become a trusted companion for farmers

features.title: 20+ Years
features.desc: Founded in 2005 with the passion, intelligence and dedication of Vietnam's leading scientists in veterinary husbandry.

features.title: 200+ Customers
features.desc: Tier-1 and tier-2 distributors across nearly 30 provinces spanning the North, Central, South and Mekong Delta regions.

disease.sub: In-depth knowledge of common diseases, prevention methods and safe treatment protocols

news.sub: Livestock market bulletins, company highlights and the latest updates
